warscrolls.name: Avatar of Khaine
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Manifestation, Endless Spell, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine

abilities.name: Wrath of Khaine
abilities.effect: Add **X** to the Attacks characteristic of this **MANIFESTATION**’s melee weapons, where **X** is the number of times you have used the ‘Blessings of Khaine’ ability this battle, to a maximum of 3.

abilities.name: Lord of Murder Incarnate
abilities.effect: This **MANIFESTATION** is affected by the ‘Blessings of Khaine’ ability as if it were a unit.

warscrolls.name: Bladewind
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Manifestation, Endless Spell, Fly, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine

abilities.name: Unnatural Edge
abilities.declare: If this **MANIFESTATION** charged this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.
abilities.effect: If any damage points are allocated to the target this phase by this **MANIFESTATION’**s combat attacks, ward rolls cannot be made for the target for the rest of the battle.

warscrolls.name: Blood Hags
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Standard Bearer (1/10), Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine, Aelf

abilities.name: Wicked Wardens
abilities.effect: While this unit is wholly within 12" of a friendly **Hag Queen on Cauldron of Blood**, **Slaughter Queen on Cauldron of Blood** or **Shrine of Dark Tribute**, this unit’s melee weapons have **Anti‑charge (+1 Rend)**.

abilities.name: Crimson Offerings
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared the ‘Blessings of Khaine’ ability
abilities.effect: If an enemy unit was destroyed by this unit’s combat attacks this turn, when resolving that ability, you can pick 2 blessings instead of 1.

warscrolls.name: Blood Sisters
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine

abilities.name: Crystal Touch
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy **INFANTRY** or **CAVALRY** unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. If the roll is equal to or less than the target’s Health characteristic, the target has **STRIKE-LAST** for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.name: Blood Stalkers
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine

abilities.name: Barbed Arrows
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a **SHOOT** ability for this unit
abilities.effect: After that **SHOOT** ability has been resolved, if all of this unit’s attacks targeted the same enemy unit, roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if any other friendly **Blood Stalkers** units picked that enemy unit to be the target of all of their shooting attacks this turn. On a 3+, until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the target, to a minimum of 1.

warscrolls.name: Bloodwrack Medusa
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine

abilities.name: Exsanguinating Glare
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase
abilities.declare: If this unit is in combat, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target. If this unit is not in combat, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of it to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. Then, if any enemy models were slain by that mortal damage, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to its Health characteristic.

abilities.name: Arcane Resonance
abilities.effect: Add 1 to casting rolls for this unit when it uses a **SUMMON** ability and add 1 to banishment rolls for this unit.

warscrolls.name: Bloodwrack Shrine
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, War Machine, Wizard (2), Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine

abilities.name: Agonising Spasms
abilities.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared a **SHOOT** ability for this unit
abilities.effect: After that **SHOOT** ability has been resolved, if all of this unit’s attacks made as part of that **SHOOT** ability targeted the same enemy unit and any enemy models were slain by those attacks, roll a dice. On a 3+, that enemy unit has a maximum control score of 1 for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Born of Slaughter
abilities.declare: If there are fewer friendly **Avatars of Khaine** on the battlefield than there are friendly **Bloodwrack Shrines** on the battlefield, make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: Set up an **Avatar of Khaine** wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Aura of Agony
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
abilities.effect:
Until the start of your next turn:

• Enemy **MANIFESTATIONS** cannot be set up within 12" of this unit.
• This unit has **WARD (4+)** against mortal damage inflicted by **SPELL** abilities, **PRAYER** abilities and abilities used by **MANIFESTATIONS**.

warscrolls.name: Bloodwrack Viper
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Manifestation, Endless Spell, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine

abilities.name: Crushing Coils
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy **HERO** or **MONSTER** in combat with this **MANIFESTATION** to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target has **STRIKE-LAST** for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Bind and Bite
abilities.effect: This unit’s combat attacks score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 4+ if the target of those attacks has **STRIKE-LAST**.

summonedBy.lore: Champions of the Arena Manifestation Lore

warscrolls.name: Doomfire Warlocks
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Wizard (1), Cavalry, Champion, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine, Aelf

abilities.name: Outmanoeuvre
abilities.effect: When this unit uses the ‘Redeploy’ command, if you roll a 1-3 when determining the distance this unit can move, you can use a value of 4 instead.

warscrolls.notes: This unit will move to Warhammer Legends on 1 June 2027.

warscrolls.name: Gryselle’s Arenai
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Infantry, Champion, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine, Aelf

abilities.name: Acrobatic Bloodshed
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, while this unit is in combat with the target, its combat attacks must target that enemy unit. In addition, if any of this unit’s attacks score a critical hit on the target this phase, the target has **STRIKE-LAST** for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.loadout:
Each model in this unit is armed with Gladiatorial Weapons. The models in this unit are:

• Gryselle, the Slaughterer (champion)
• Thrialla, the Lash
• Retaria, the Entangler
• Kalexis, the Silvered Blur
• Traxya, the Aegis

warscrolls.name: Hag Queen
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Priest (1), Infantry, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine, Aelf

abilities.name: Catechisms of Violence
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase
abilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, each time a visible friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE** unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses a **FIGHT** ability, after that ability has been resolved, you can pick a visible friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE PRIEST** wholly within 12" of this unit. That **PRIEST** gains 1 ritual point.

warscrolls.name: Hag Queen on Cauldron of Blood
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Priest (1), War Machine, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine, Aelf

abilities.name: Wrathful Repulsion
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE** unit that is wholly within 12" of this unit and is in combat with an enemy unit that charged this turn to be the target. If there are any friendly **Slaughter Queens on Cauldrons of Blood** on the battlefield, you can pick another eligible unit to be a second target.
abilities.effect: The targets have **WARD (5+)** for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Roaring Idol
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE MANIFESTATION** wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target cannot be picked to be the target of **BANISH** abilities used by enemy units until the start of your next turn.

warscrolls.name: Heart of Fury
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Manifestation, Endless Spell, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine

abilities.name: Locus of the Murder God
abilities.effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks that target friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE INFANTRY** units while they are wholly within 12" of this **MANIFESTATION**.

summonedBy.lore: Champions of the Arena Manifestation Lore

warscrolls.name: High Gladiatrix
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Infantry, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine, Aelf

abilities.name: Paragon of Slaughter
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE INFANTRY** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect:
If this unit is in combat, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.

If this unit is not in combat, roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.notes: This HERO can join an eligible regiment as a Coven Matriarch.

warscrolls.name: Khainite Shadowstalkers
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion (1/9), Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine, Aelf

abilities.name: Shadow Leap
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
abilities.effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.

warscrolls.name: Khinerai Heartrenders
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Fly, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine

abilities.name: Fire and Flight
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a **SHOOT** ability for this unit
abilities.effect: After that **SHOOT** ability has been resolved, this unit can move 2D6". It cannot move into combat during any part of that move.

warscrolls.name: Khinerai Lifetakers
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Fly, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine

abilities.name: Fight and Flight
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.effect: If this unit is in combat, it can move 12". It can pass through the combat ranges of enemy units but cannot end that move in combat. Then, roll a D3 for each enemy unit that this unit passed across during that move. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that enemy unit equal to the roll.

warscrolls.name: Knives of the Crone
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Infantry, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine, Aelf

abilities.name: Rituals of Prophecy
abilities.effect:
Roll 6 dice:

• For each 1, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn.
• For each 3, add 1" to this unit’s Move characteristic until the start of your next turn.
• If any of the rolls are a 6, add 1 to save rolls for this unit until the start of your next turn.

warscrolls.loadout:
Each model in this unit is armed with Haruspicy Blades. The models in this unit are:

• Kaerna Vix (champion)
• Tazari
• Krieta, Wing of the Crone
• Azphel, the Hag’s Eye (also armed with an Aelven Crossbow)

warscrolls.name: Krethusa the Croneseer
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Priest (2), Infantry, Fly, Ward (5+), Order, Daughters of Khaine, Aelf

abilities.name: Omens of Doom
abilities.declare: Make a chanting roll of D6.
abilities.effect:
Pick 1 of the following effects. If the chanting roll was 10+, pick up to 2 different effects instead.

**Prophecy of Exile**: Pick a visible enemy **WIZARD** or **PRIEST** within 18" of this unit. Subtract 1 from that unit’s power level until the start of your next turn.

**Prophecy of Dark Wings:** Pick a visible friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE INFANTRY** unit wholly within 12" of this unit. That unit can immediately use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase and counts as having used a **RUN** ability this turn.

**Prophecy of Futile Endeavours:** Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit. Until the start of your next turn, that unit’s attacks cannot score critical hits (treat them as regular hits instead).

abilities.name: The Croneseer
abilities.effect:
Each time you perform a blood rite, immediately after the ability that destroyed a unit has been resolved, give this unit 1 **prophecy token**.

• While this unit has 2 or more **prophecy tokens**, this unit cannot be picked to be the target of shooting attacks or **SPELL** abilities used by enemy units.

• While this unit has 3 or more **prophecy tokens**, you can re-roll unmodified chanting rolls of 1 for this unit.

• While this unit has 4 or more **prophecy tokens**, if the unmodified hit roll for an attack that targets this unit is 1-4, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.

warscrolls.name: Maleneth Witchblade
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Infantry, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine, Aelf

abilities.name: Vial of Secrets
abilities.effect: If the unmodified hit roll for an attack that targets this unit is 1-4, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.

abilities.name: Strike From the Shadows
abilities.declare: Pick this unit if it is **in hiding**. Then, pick a friendly **INFANTRY** unit that has 5 or more models to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 6" of the target. If you do so, this unit must be set up in combat and has **STRIKE-FIRST** for the rest of the turn. On a failed roll, this unit remains **in hiding** but you automatically pass the roll the next time you use this ability.

abilities.name: Hidden Agent
abilities.effect: If this unit has not been deployed, set up this unit in reserve **in hiding**. It has now been deployed.

warscrolls.name: Melusai Ironscale
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Infantry, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine

abilities.name: Ironscale's Fury
abilities.effect: Each time a model in a friendly non-**HERO DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE** unit is slain by a combat attack, if that friendly unit is within this unit’s combat range and that model was in combat with the attacking unit, roll a dice. If that friendly unit is a **Blood Sisters** or a **Blood Stalkers** unit, roll 2 dice instead. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the **FIGHT** ability has been resolved.

warscrolls.notes: This HERO can join an eligible regiment as a Coven Matriarch.

warscrolls.name: Morathi-Khaine
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Warmaster, Unique, Hero, Wizard (3), Infantry, Ward (4+), Order, Daughters of Khaine, Aelf

abilities.name: Surge of Hatred
abilities.declare: Pick either a friendly **Shadow Queen** wholly within 12" of this unit and in combat or a visible friendly non-**HERO DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE** unit wholly within 12" of this unit and in combat to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: If the target is a friendly **Shadow Queen**, it can immediately use a **FIGHT** ability as if it were your combat phase. Otherwise, inflict D3 mortal damage on each enemy unit in combat with the target.

abilities.name: Divine Matriarch
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE PRIEST** or **WIZARD** wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Add 1 to casting rolls and chanting rolls for the target until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: The Iron Heart of Khaine
abilities.effect:
Each time you perform a blood rite, immediately after the ability that destroyed a unit has been resolved, pick 1 of the following effects:

• Until the start of your next turn, this unit is only visible to enemy units while those units are within its combat range.
• **Heal (D6)** this unit or a friendly Shadow Queen. 
• A friendly **Shadow Queen** can immediately use the ‘Normal Move’ or ‘Retreat’ ability as if it was your movement phase.
• Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.
• For the rest of the turn, set this unit’s Control characteristic to 5 and a friendly **Shadow Queen’s** Control characteristic to 15.

warscrolls.name: Morgwaeth's Blade-coven
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Infantry, Champion, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine, Aelf

abilities.name: Witchbrew
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target has **WARD (5+)** for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Morgwaeth the Bloodied
abilities.effect: While this unit’s **Morgwaeth the Bloodied** is on the battlefield, it has **PRIEST (1)**.

warscrolls.loadout:
Each model in this unit is armed with Sacrificial Weapons. The models in this unit are:

• Morgwaeth the Bloodied (champion)
• Khamyss
• Kyrssa
• Lethyr
• Kyrae (also armed with a Heartseeker Bow)

warscrolls.name: Scourge of Ghyran Bloodwrack Shrine
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, War Machine, Wizard (2), Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine, Melusai

abilities.name: Wracking Gaze
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 15" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. If the roll is equal to or less than that enemy unit’s Health characteristic, for the rest of the phase, you can re-roll failed hit rolls for attacks made by this unit that target that enemy unit.

abilities.name: Reflected Agony
abilities.declare: Make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: Until the start of your next turn, enemy units and enemy **MANIFESTATIONS** cannot be set up within 12" of this unit.

warscrolls.notes: This unit is legal for Matched Play for battles fought using the General’s Handbook 2025-26 battlepack.

warscrolls.name: Scourge of Ghyran Krethusa the Croneseer
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Priest (2), Infantry, Fly, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine, Aelf

abilities.name: Gift of Foresight
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly non-**UNIQUE DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE AELF INFANTRY** or **CAVALRY** unit that has been destroyed to be the target.
abilities.effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Blood Ritual
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE AELF INFANTRY** or **CAVALRY** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target. Then, make a chanting roll of D6.
abilities.effect:
Pick 1 of the following effects to apply until the start of your next turn:

***Prophecy of Tyranny:*** Enemy units cannot use commands while they are in combat with the target.

***Prophecy of Shelter:*** Other than the **COMPANION** ability, weapon abilities used by enemy units while they are in combat with the target have no effect.

***Prophecy of Retribution:*** Subtract 1 from ward rolls made for damage points inflicted by the target’s combat attacks.

If the chanting roll was 9+, all of the above effects apply.

abilities.name: The Croneseer
abilities.effect: Give this unit D3 ritual points.

warscrolls.notes: This unit is legal for Matched Play for battles fought using the General’s Handbook 2025-26 battlepack.

warscrolls.name: Shrine of Dark Tribute
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Faction Terrain, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine

abilities.name: In Dark Communion
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE WIZARD** or **PRIEST** within 3" of this terrain feature to be the target.
abilities.effect: The target is in **dark communion** until this terrain feature uses this ability again or until this terrain feature is removed from the battlefield, whichever comes first. While the target is in **dark communion**, you can re-roll 1 casting roll or 1 chanting roll for the target each turn.

abilities.name: Call to Murder
abilities.effect:
Pick a blessing from the ‘Blessings of Khaine’ ability that is **active**. That blessing is no longer **active**. Then, pick a blessing that is not **active**. That blessing is now **active**.

**Designer’s Note:** *When you use this ability, you are not using the ‘Blessings of Khaine’ ability.*

warscrolls.loadout:
The following universal terrain abilities apply to this terrain feature (Terrain, 1.2):

Cover, Impassable

warscrolls.name: Sisters of Slaughter
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Musician (1/5), Standard Bearer (1/5), Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine, Aelf

abilities.name: Dance of Death
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit that charged this turn and is in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls and wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.name: Slaughter Queen
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Priest (1), Infantry, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine, Aelf

abilities.name: Fanatical Blademaster
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, pick a blessing from the ‘Blessings of Khaine’ ability that is not **active**. The effect of that blessing applies to the target until the start of your next turn as if it were **active**. If you have used the ‘Blessings of Khaine’ ability 3 or more times this battle, you can pick 2 blessings instead of 1.

warscrolls.name: Slaughter Queen on Cauldron of Blood
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Priest (1), War Machine, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine, Aelf

abilities.name: Consecrated Revulsion
abilities.effect: Add 1 to save rolls for visible friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE INFANTRY** units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

abilities.name: Icon of Slaughter
abilities.effect: Each time a friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE** unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ‘Rally’ command, you can make 3 additional rally rolls of D6. In addition, if there are any friendly **Hag Queens on Cauldrons of Blood** on the battlefield when that command is used, you receive D3 additional rally points.

warscrolls.name: The Shadeborn
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Infantry, Champion, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine, Aelf

abilities.name: Shadow Leap
abilities.effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Mask of Shadowed Mirrors
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target cannot use commands for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.loadout:
Each model in this unit is armed with Cursed Missiles and Shadowstalker Blades. The models in this unit are:

• Slythael Shadestalker (champion)
• Drusylla Vyserax
• Sylarc Greyblood
• Valyssa Umbrael

warscrolls.name: The Shadow Queen
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Monster, Fly, Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine

abilities.name: Battle Damaged
abilities.effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its **Heartrender** is 5.

abilities.name: Coils of the Shadow Queen
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: If any enemy units are **constricted**, they are no longer **constricted**. Pick an enemy **HERO** or **MONSTER** in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect:
Roll a dice. On a 3+, until the start of your next turn, the target is **constricted** while it is in combat with this unit.

This unit’s combat attacks that target a **constricted** enemy unit score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+.

abilities.name: Two Bodies, One Soul
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Hero Phase
abilities.declare: This unit can use this ability even if it has been destroyed. If you have used the Blessings of Khaine ability 3 or more times this battle, pick a friendly **Morathi-Khaine** or **Shadow Queen** that has been destroyed to be the target.
abilities.effect: Set up a replacement unit identical to the target within 3" of a friendly **Morathi-Khaine** or **Shadow Queen**.

abilities.name: Crown of Serpents
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect:
Roll 5 dice. Add 2 to each roll if the target is **constricted**. For each 5+, pick 1 of the following effects. You cannot pick the same effect more than once per turn.

• Subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target's combat attacks for the rest of the turn.
• Subtract 1 from wound rolls for the target's combat attacks for the rest of the turn.
• Random characteristic rolls for the Damage characteristic of the target's melee weapons are treated as unmodified rolls of 1 for the rest of the turn.
• Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
• The target cannot be healed or have slain models returned to it for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.notes: This unit can only be taken in Morathi‐Khaine’s regiment.

warscrolls.name: Witch Aelves
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Musician (1/5), Standard Bearer (1/5), Ward (6+), Order, Daughters of Khaine, Aelf

abilities.name: Frenzied Fervour
abilities.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons if it charged in the same turn.

rules.name: Final Frenzy
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
rules.declare: Pick each friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE** unit contesting an objective to be the targets.
rules.effect: Return up to D3 slain models to each target that has a Health characteristic of up to 2. Return up to 1 slain model to each target that has a Health characteristic of 3 or more.

rules.name: Graceful Elusion
rules.effect: For the rest of the phase, friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE AELF INFANTRY** units have **WARD (5+)** until they have used a **FIGHT** ability.

rules.name: Heretic's Bane
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Start of Enemy Turn
rules.declare: Pick an enemy **WIZARD** or **PRIEST** on the battlefield to be the target.
rules.effect: Roll a dice for each objective you control. For each 3+, subtract 1 from casting rolls and chanting rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.

rules.name: Higher Purpose
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
rules.effect: Return D3 slain models to each friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE AELF INFANTRY** unit.

rules.name: The Breath of Khaine
rules.effect: While each model in a friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE** unit is contesting an objective you control, those models are not visible to enemy models more than 9" away.

rules.name: Bloody-Handed Worshippers
rules.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared a **FIGHT** ability for an anointed unit
rules.effect: Pick a friendly non-**HERO DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE** unit that has not used a **FIGHT** ability this turn and is within that anointed unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a **FIGHT** ability immediately after the **FIGHT** ability used by that **anointed** unit has been resolved. If it is picked to do so, the target’s melee weapons have **Crit (Auto-wound)** for the rest of the turn. If its melee weapons already have **Crit (Auto-wound)**, they have **Crit (Mortal)** for the rest of the turn instead.

spells.name: Catechism of Murder
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: The target’s melee weapons have **Crit (Auto-wound)** until the start of your next turn. In addition, if the chanting roll was 7+, the target’s combat attacks score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+ until the start of your next turn.

spells.name: Dance of Doom
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly non-**UNIQUE DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn. In addition, if the chanting roll was 10+, the target can use 2 **FIGHT** abilities this turn. After the first is used, however, the target has **STRIKE-LAST** for the rest of the turn.

spells.name: Covenant of the Iron Heart
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Add 10 to the target’s control score until the start of your next turn. In addition, if the chanting roll was 6+, ignore the first damage point that would be allocated to the target in each phase until the start of your next turn.

spells.name: Black Horror of Ulgu
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a point on the battlefield within 18" of them, pick up to 3 enemy units within 3" of that point to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: The targets cannot use **RUN** abilities until the start of your next turn.

spells.name: Steed of Shadows
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: The target can use **CHARGE** abilities this turn even if it used a **RUN** ability in the same turn.

spells.name: Mindrazor
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: The target’s melee weapons have **Charge (+1 Damage)** until the start of your next turn.

spells.name: Scáthscale
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE AELF INFANTRY** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from wound rolls for combat attacks that target that friendly unit. If the chanting roll was 8+, until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from wound rolls for combat attacks that target friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE AELF INFANTRY** units while they are wholly within 12" of the target of this ability instead.

spells.name: Shadowstep
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE AELF INFANTRY** unit wholly within 12" of them and that has not been picked to be the target of this prayer this turn to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: The target can move up to 6". It can move through the combat ranges of enemy units but cannot end that move in combat. If the chanting roll was 8+, you can pick another eligible unit to be a second target.

spells.name: Exultation of Murder
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE AELF INFANTRY** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks. In addition, if the chanting roll was 9+, until the start of your next turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons.

spells.name: Summon Bladewind
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Bladewind** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Bladewind** wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.

spells.name: Summon Bloodwrack Viper
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Bloodwrack Viper** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Bloodwrack Viper** wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.

spells.name: Summon Heart of Fury
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Heart of Fury** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE PRIEST** to chant this prayer, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Heart of Fury** wholly within 18" of the chanter and visible to them.

artefacts.name: Crimson Draught
artefacts.effect: You can re-roll charge rolls for this unit.

artefacts.name: Darkling Elixir
artefacts.declare: Pick a visible friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
artefacts.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target can immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability as if it were your movement phase.

artefacts.name: Witchbrew
artefacts.declare: Pick a visible friendly non-**UNIQUE DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
artefacts.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, ignore negative modifiers to save rolls for the target until the start of your next turn.

artefacts.name: Amulet of the Bladed Queen
artefacts.effect: This unit has **WARD (5+)**. Add 1 to save rolls for this unit.

artefacts.name: Death Razor
artefacts.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared a **FIGHT** ability for this unit
artefacts.effect: After that **FIGHT** ability has been resolved, if any enemy models were slain by this unit’s attacks made as part of that **FIGHT** ability, you can pick a friendly **CHAMPIONS OF THE ARENA PRIEST** wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target. Instead of making a chanting roll for the next **PRAYER** ability used by the target, you can use a value of 10 for the roll that cannot be modified, even if this unit has been destroyed.

artefacts.name: Blade of Prophetic Doom
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn, End of Any Turn
artefacts.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
artefacts.effect:
Roll a dice. On a 2+:

• If the target is not damaged, inflict 1 mortal damage on it.
• If the target is damaged, inflict an amount of mortal damage on it equal to the roll.

heroicTraits.name: Shadow-Blooded
heroicTraits.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared the ‘Redeploy’ command for a **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE** unit wholly within 12" of this unit
heroicTraits.effect: If you roll a 1-3 when determining the distance that unit can move, you can use a value of 4 instead.

heroicTraits.name: Murderous Duellist
heroicTraits.declare: Pick an enemy unit that has no more than 1 model and is in combat with this unit to be the target.
heroicTraits.effect: Roll 2D6. If the roll equals or exceeds the target’s Control characteristic, for the rest of the turn, if this unit is in combat with the target when the target is picked to use a **FIGHT** ability, all of the target’s attacks must target this unit.

heroicTraits.name: Hand of Khaine
heroicTraits.declare: Pick an enemy **HERO** in combat with this unit to be the target.
heroicTraits.effect: Roll 2D6. If the roll exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, it is automatically destroyed. If the target is destroyed by this ability, this unit can use 2 **FIGHT** abilities this phase. After the first is used, however, this unit has **STRIKE-LAST** for the rest of the turn.

heroicTraits.name: Khaine's Inheritor
heroicTraits.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target.
heroicTraits.effect:
Roll a D3. On a 2+:

• Inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
• Halve the target’s Move characteristic until the start of your next turn.

heroicTraits.name: Hero of the Killing Games
heroicTraits.effect:
For the rest of the turn, while this unit is in combat with any enemy **HEROES**:
• Add 1 to the Attacks, Rend and Damage characteristics of this unit’s melee weapons.
• All of its combat attacks must target the same enemy **HERO**.

heroicTraits.name: Proselyte of Morai-Heg
heroicTraits.effect: Enemy units cannot use commands while they are in combat with this unit.

other.name: Fierce Competition
other.effect:
Each time a unit in this Regiment of Renown uses an ability and any enemy models were slain by that ability, after that ability has been resolved, the unit that used that ability is **pre‑eminent** and the other unit in this Regiment of Renown is **overlooked**.

Weapons used by an **overlooked** unit in this Regiment of Renown have **Crit (Auto‑wound)**.

other.name: Site of Slaughter
other.effect: Pick an objective wholly outside friendly territory. That objective is considered by you to be the **amphitheatre**.

other.name: Finishing Moves
other.effect:
While each model in a unit in this Regiment of Renown is contesting the **amphitheatre**:

• That unit’s melee weapons have **Crit (Mortal)**.
• If you control the **amphitheatre**, if the unmodified hit roll or wound roll for an attack that targets that unit is a 1-4, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.

battleTraits.name: Anointed Ritualist
battleTraits.declare: If there are no friendly **anointed** units on the battlefield, pick a friendly non-**UNIQUE DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE HERO** on the battlefield to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: The target is **anointed** for the rest of the battle, even if it has been destroyed. Friendly **anointed** units on the battlefield treat **EXALTED** abilities on the warscrolls of friendly **anointed** units that have been destroyed as if they were on their warscrolls.

battleTraits.name: Bloody Succession
battleTraits.effect: Each time a friendly **anointed** unit is destroyed, after removing it from play, you can immediately use the ‘Anointed Ritualist’ ability as if it were the start of the first battle round.

battleTraits.name: Strident War Cry
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a **CHARGE** ability for an anointed unit
battleTraits.effect: Pick a friendly non-**HERO DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE** unit that is not in combat, is wholly within 12" of that **anointed** unit and has not charged this turn to be the target. If that **anointed** unit charges, after that **CHARGE** ability has been resolved, the target can immediately use the ‘Charge’ ability even if it is not your charge phase. In addition, you can re-roll charge rolls for the target for the rest of the phase.

battleTraits.name: Blood Rites
battleTraits.effect:
You perform a blood rite each time:

• An enemy unit is destroyed and any damage points were allocated to that unit by a friendly **anointed** unit’s combat attacks in the same turn.
• A friendly **anointed** unit is destroyed.
• A friendly unit contesting an objective you control is destroyed.
• An enemy unit is destroyed by a friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE** unit’s attacks and any models in that enemy unit were contesting an objective you do not control in the same phase.
• A unit (friendly or enemy) is destroyed and it was within 3" of a **Place of Power** at the start of the phase.

battleTraits.name: Blessings of Khaine
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
battleTraits.declare: You can only use this ability if you performed any blood rites this turn.
battleTraits.effect:
Pick 1 of the following blessings that is not **active**. That blessing is **active**. While a blessing is **active**, its effect applies to friendly **DAUGHTERS OF KHAINE** units. The effects of more than 1 blessing can apply to a unit at the same time.

• ***Blessing of Ruthlessness:*** Add 1 to hit rolls for those units’ combat attacks.
• ***Blessing of Hatred:*** Add 1 to wound rolls for those units’ combat attacks.
• ***Blessing of Haste:*** Add 3" to those units’ Move characteristic.
• ***Blessing of Zeal:*** If those units charged in the same turn, they have **WARD (5+)** for the rest of the turn.
• ***Blessing of Shadow:*** Subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target those units.
• ***Blessing of Cruelty:*** Those units can use **CHARGE** and/or **SHOOT** abilities even if they have used a **RETREAT** ability in the same turn.
• ***Blessing of Clarity:*** Add 1 to chanting rolls and casting rolls for those units.

battleTraits.name: Dark Majesty
battleTraits.effect: If the unmodified hit roll for an attack made by a non‑**HERO** unit that targets the friendly **Morathi‑Khaine** is 1-4, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.

battleTraits.name: The Blood Saints
battleTraits.effect: While the friendly **Shadow Queen** is wholly within 6" of a friendly non-**HERO ZAINTHAR KAI** unit, both that **Shadow Queen** and that non-**HERO** unit have **WARD (5+)**.

battleTraits.name: Matriarch of the Zainthar Kai
battleTraits.declare: Pick the friendly **Morathi-Khaine** to use this ability.
battleTraits.effect:
Pick 1 of the following effects:

• Until the start of your next turn, this unit has a Move characteristic of 12" and has **FLY**.
• This unit can use the ‘Iron Heart of Khaine’ ability as if you had performed a blood rite.
• Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target. For the rest of the turn, the target’s attacks cannot score critical hits (treat them as regular hits instead).
• Pick a friendly non-**UNIQUE ZAINTHAR KAI HERO** that has been destroyed to be the target. Set up a replacement unit identical to the target within 3" of this unit.

battleTraits.name: Cursed Heritage
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Your Turn
battleTraits.declare: Pick each enemy unit in combat with any non-**UNIQUE ZAINTHAR KAI** units to be the targets.
battleTraits.effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on each target.

battleTraits.name: Arena of Slaughter
battleTraits.effect:
If the number of units (friendly or enemy) that have been destroyed this battle equals or exceeds any of the numbers below, the corresponding effect applies to friendly **CHAMPIONS OF THE ARENA** units for the rest of the battle. More than 1 effect can apply to a unit at the same time.

**1** Add 1 to run rolls for those units.
**2** Add 1 to charge rolls for those units.
**3**  Add 1 to hit rolls for those units’ combat attacks.
**4**  Add 1 to wound rolls for those units’ combat attacks.
**5**  Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of those units’ melee weapons.

battleTraits.name: Let the Blood Flow
battleTraits.effect:
All effects of the ‘Arena of Slaughter’ ability apply to friendly **CHAMPIONS OF THE ARENA** units while they are wholly within **X**" of a friendly **Shrine of Dark Tribute**, where **X** is determined by the current battle round, as follows:

**Battle Round** - **X**
1 - 9"
2 - 12"
3 - 15"
4 - 18"
5 - 21"

battleTraits.name: Frenzied Restoration
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly **Champions of the Arena Hero** that has been destroyed to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: Set up a replacement unit identical to the target wholly within 12" of a friendly **Shrine of Dark Tribute** and more than 9" from all enemy units.

battleTraits.name: Explosive Fury
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly **Slaughter Queen** to use this ability, then pick each friendly **Blood Hags** unit on the battlefield and each visible friendly **CHAMPIONS OF THE ARENA** unit wholly within 12" of that **Slaughter Queen** to be the targets.
battleTraits.effect: For the rest of the turn, each time a target makes a pile-in move, add 3" to the distance it can move.

battleTraits.name: Plumes of Auspicious Smoke
battleTraits.effect:
Effect: Friendly **CAULDRON OF BLOOD** units are either **empty** or **full**. They start the battle **empty**. While a friendly **CAULDRON OF BLOOD** unit is **full**:

• That **CAULDRON OF BLOOD** has **WARD (4+)** against damage points inflicted by shooting attacks.
• Subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target friendly **CRONESEER’S PARIAHS** units while they are wholly within 9" of that **CAULDRON OF BLOOD**.

battleTraits.name: Skilled Skirmishers
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly **CRONESEER’S PARIAHS CAVALRY** unit that has not charged this turn and is in combat with an enemy unit that charged this turn to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: Roll a dice. On 3+, the target can immediately use a **RETREAT** ability as if it were your movement phase. In addition, no mortal damage is inflicted on the target by that **RETREAT** ability.

battleTraits.name: Guided by Morai-Heg
battleTraits.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of combat attacks made by friendly non-**HERO INFANTRY** units while they are wholly within 9" of a friendly **Krethusa**.

battleTraits.name: The Blood Reveals All
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Hero Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly **CRONESEER’S PARIAHS HERO** within the combat range of a friendly **empty** **CAULDRON OF BLOOD**. Then, pick another unit within the combat range of that **HERO** to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: Roll a dice. Allocate a number of damage points to the target equal to the roll (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points). Then, that **CAULDRON OF BLOOD** becomes **full**.

battleTraits.name: Laden with Prophecy
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly **empty CAULDRON OF BLOOD**.
battleTraits.effect: If any enemy models were slain this turn by that **CAULDRON OF BLOOD**’s combat attacks, it becomes **full**.
